Project Overview

Key Milestones + Sign-Off Dates
Target Date Milestone Workstream Status Notes

May 28 – 29 Green Light Brand Guidelines + Photography DirectionDecision Visual Brand System + Guidelines Upcoming Goal to make final revisions and deliver by June 9
